name: Cherry Cheese Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the pastry and place it on a 16-inch pizza pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes.
3. In a bowl, blend together the cream cheese, sugar, eggs, chopped walnuts, and vanilla until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie crust.
5. Bake for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Allow to cool until cold before topping with cherry pie filling.
7. Optionally top with whipped cream.
